text:
, referred to as just Velza, is the enemy boss in the game Fullmetal Alchemist 3: The Girl Who Surpasses God. Under her mysterious control are four powerful beings known as the Guardians of Ice, Fire, Wind and Earth, who have been causing trouble in town. Velza also appears to have a strange connection to alchemist Sophie Bergmann. Though she appears as a beautiful, white-haired young woman in a flowing cloak, Velza also takes the form a giant monster and a fearsome version of herself when angered. Near the end of the game, Velza is cleansed of her burdens by Sophie and released from this world.
